head.title: HubSpot | Software & Tools for your Business - Homepage

h1: Where go-to-market teams go to grow scale close retain grow

findings.message: Two distinct conversion CTAs above the fold — a focused primary + secondary pattern.
evidence: Get a demo of HubSpot's premium software
Get started free with HubSpot's free tools

findings.message: The conversion CTA is prominent but not the single strongest visual element.
evidence: primary CTA salience 40 vs page max 50

findings.message: Clear value proposition in the hero ("Where go-to-market teams go to grow scale close retain grow") with a single h1.
evidence: Where go-to-market teams go to grow scale close retain grow

findings.message: Focused navigation (5 above-fold nav items) — minimal distraction from the primary action.
